task_objective: Report manual backup and restore no-ops as skipped/local_current when Ludusavi returns change=Same.
design_decisions: Treat only the exact per-game change value Same as skipped/local_current.
Preserve backed_up/restored behavior when change data is missing or malformed.
Refresh registry state after both skipped and successful manual operations.
Leave point-in-time restore and frontend rendering unchanged.

results.tdd_red: Backup Same returned backed_up and restore Same returned restored before implementation.

quality_gates.frontend_pre_commit: 166 unit tests passed; typecheck, build, packaging, and supply-chain checks passed

results.review: Approved after round 01 verified a clean uv.lock and fresh quality-gate evidence.
results.dev_push: origin/dev updated to merge commit before release dispatch
results.device_testing: Deferred until the v0.3.0 development prerelease is published.
